subcodes.first_line: Verily, this Day proclaimeth and declareth: O people! The Manifestation of the Cause hath appeared, and through Him the Trumpet hath been sounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الیوم ینادی و یقول یا قوم قد ظهر مظهر الامر و به نفخ فی الصور
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @living waters; water of life
